highlights.text: The first was 5734 to 5805 and I wrote exactly 1 week ago at 4pm: “Bull case tomorrow: No change.
The bull case is that we just work this back up to the upside.
Then, they formed another bull flag on Thursday and I wrote in my Thursday newsletter: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.

post_title: SPX Goes Full-On Parabolic, How Much Does It Have Left Though? Oct 15 Plan
